title: ipomoea acetosellifolia
intro: Ipomoea acetosellifolia, also known as purple potato vine or purple potato morning glory, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea acetosellifolia include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Ipomoea acetosellifolia include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent.
